title: Ricotta Casserole
description: A simple and comforting casserole made with ricotta cheese and topped with a crispy American cheese crust.
instructions: Combine ricotta cheese, marinara sauce, and 1/2 cup of the shredded mozzarella cheese in a bowl.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Top the ricotta mixture with the shredded American cheese.
Cover the dish with aluminum foil and bake for 30 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Let the casserole rest for 10 minutes before serving.
